query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_device_group (
    id                      INT          NOT NULL,
    raw_id                  BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    name                    VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    description             TEXT         DEFAULT NULL,
    mod_time                BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    built_in                BOOLEAN      NOT NULL,
    include_custom_devices  BOOLEAN      NOT NULL,
    dynamic                 BOOLEAN      NOT NULL,
    field                   VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
    value                   VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
    filter                  JSON         DEFAULT NULL,
    editors                 JSON         DEFAULT NULL,
    polled_at               DATETIME(3)  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (id),
    KEY idx_dg_built_in (built_in),
    KEY fk_dg_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_dg_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_vlan (
    id              INT          NOT NULL,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    vlanid          INT          NOT NULL,
    network_id      INT          NOT NULL,
    node_id         INT          DEFAULT NULL,
    name            VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
    description     TEXT         DEFAULT NULL,
    mod_time        BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3)  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (id),
    KEY idx_vlan_tag (vlanid),
    KEY fk_vlan_network (network_id),
    KEY fk_vlan_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_vlan_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_alert (
    id              INT          NOT NULL,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    author          VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    description     TEXT         DEFAULT NULL,
    mod_time        BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    type            VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL,
    severity        TINYINT      NOT NULL,
    disabled        BOOLEAN      NOT NULL,
    stat_name       VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    field_name      VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    field_name2     VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
    field_op        VARCHAR(10)  DEFAULT NULL,
    operator        VARCHAR(10)  NOT NULL,
    operand         VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    units           VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none',
    interval_length INT          NOT NULL,
    refire_interval INT          NOT NULL,
    notify_snmp     BOOLEAN      NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    apply_all       BOOLEAN      NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    param           JSON         NOT NULL,
    param2          JSON         NOT NULL,
    cc              JSON         NOT NULL,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3)  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (id),
    KEY idx_alert_severity (severity),
    KEY idx_alert_type (type),
    KEY fk_alert_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_alert_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_vlan (
    id              INT          NOT NULL,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    vlanid          INT          NOT NULL,
    network_id      INT          NOT NULL,
    node_id         INT          DEFAULT NULL,
    name            VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
    description     TEXT         DEFAULT NULL,
    mod_time        BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3)  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (id),
    KEY idx_vlan_tag (vlanid),
    KEY fk_vlan_network (network_id),
    KEY fk_vlan_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_vlan_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_alert (
    id              INT          NOT NULL,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    author          VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    description     TEXT         DEFAULT NULL,
    mod_time        BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    type            VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL,
    severity        TINYINT      NOT NULL,
    disabled        BOOLEAN      NOT NULL,
    stat_name       VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    field_name      VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    field_name2     VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
    field_op        VARCHAR(10)  DEFAULT NULL,
    operator        VARCHAR(10)  NOT NULL,
    operand         VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    units           VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none',
    interval_length INT          NOT NULL,
    refire_interval INT          NOT NULL,
    notify_snmp     BOOLEAN      NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    apply_all       BOOLEAN      NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    param           JSON         NOT NULL,
    param2          JSON         NOT NULL,
    cc              JSON         NOT NULL,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3)  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (id),
    KEY idx_alert_severity (severity),
    KEY idx_alert_type (type),
    KEY fk_alert_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_alert_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET
